prestazioni: VQ35DE (Rev-Up variant, 3.5L V6) forced induction via Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (106mm compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing) with custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by Tomei, supporting 550whp on E85 with a BorgWarner SX-E 40mm wastegate and 44mm Tial MV-R blow-off valve

Full bolt-on internals upgrade: JE 9.5:1 forged pistons (2618 alloy), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series main and rod bearings, Tomei Type-A 272°/272° camshafts with Tomei adjustable cam gears, and a K1 Technologies billet crankshaft for 8,500 RPM reliability

Fuel system overhaul: Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors (1,050cc), Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger, and a custom AEM Infinity 7 ECU with flex-fuel sensor, paired with a Tomei 76mm titanium intake plenum and HKS Hi-Power 70mm throttle body
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit (full carbon fiber, 3-piece fender flares with integrated LED turn signals) paired with a Rocket Bunny V3 rear bumper and custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the roof and mirrors

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable dampers, 8-position rebound, and 20-way compression) with custom-spec spring rates (12kg/mm front, 14kg/mm rear) and Cusco pillowball upper mounts, complemented by a Cusco front strut bar and rear sway bar (22mm adjustable)

Custom interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) with Takata 4-point harnesses, NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a full carbon fiber dash overlay by Seibon, including a custom gauge pod housing Defi Advance BF gauges (oil pressure, boost, and wideband AFR)
